nodes.label: assets/delete.webp — UI screenshot: Dragit branch list with delete selection highlighted
nodes.description: macOS-style app window titled 'Dragit' showing a vertical list of four git branches: hotfix-1, hotfix-2 (cursor hovering), hotfix-3, and main. Each card displays branch name with a branch icon, tracking remote (e.g. origin/hotfix-1), and last-modified time. The 'main' branch card is outlined in red/pink, indicating it is selected for deletion. Demonstrates the branch delete feature of the Dragit GUI git client.
nodes.design_notes: Dark theme UI. Branch cards use consistent layout: icon + name, remote tracking label in bold, muted timestamp. Active/selected-for-delete card uses a red border to signal destructive action. Hand cursor visible on hotfix-2 card suggesting hover state.
